title: Braeside
content:
Roof Restoration Braeside

If your roof is showing its age, leaking during heavy rain, or has simply lost its colour and appeal, it might be time for a professional roof restoration in Braeside. At Sandhurst Roofing, we help local homeowners and businesses bring their roofs back to life — improving appearance, performance, and long-term protection.

Get a Free Quote!

Local Roofing Experts You Can Count On

Our team has been restoring roofs across Melbourne’s south-east for decades — and we know precisely what roofs in Braeside go through. Between changing weather, strong winds from nearby bayside suburbs, and everyday wear, it’s easy for tiles or metal sheets to deteriorate. That’s where we come in. We provide tailored roof restoration solutions for:
  • Residential homes with tiled or metal roofs
  • Factories and commercial buildings with large metal roofing areas
  • Older properties that need careful restoration work
Every project starts with a thorough roof inspection so we can provide the right advice and a precise quote — no surprises, no hidden costs.Get a Free Quote!

What Our Braeside Roof Restoration Service Includes

Our roof restoration process is detailed and designed for long-lasting results:

  1. Roof cleaning – We remove dirt, debris, moss, and contaminants using high-pressure cleaning.
  2. Repairs and re-pointing – Cracked tiles or rusted metal sheets are repaired or replaced; ridge caps are re-bedded and re-pointed.
  3. Gutter and flashing maintenance – Ensuring your drainage system works efficiently to prevent water damage.
  4. Sealing and coating – Applying industry-grade sealers and paints to protect against UV, corrosion, and moisture.
  5. Final inspection – We double-check every detail to make sure your roof looks and performs flawlessly.

Why Choose Sandhurst Roofing in Braeside

  • Decades of experience in roof restoration and repairs
  • Fully licensed and insured roofing professionals
  • High-quality materials designed for Melbourne’s coastal conditions
  • Custom solutions for tile, metal, or Colorbond® roofs
  • Affordable pricing without compromising on workmanship

We pride ourselves on honest advice, reliable service, and results that stand the test of time.

The Benefits of a Roof Restoration

  • Extends the lifespan of your roof
  • Improves your property’s curb appeal
  • Prevents costly water damage and leaks
  • Boosts your home’s overall value
  • Adds energy efficiency by reflecting more heat
Restoring your roof is one of the most innovative ways to protect your investment — and it’s far more cost-effective than a complete roof replacement.

What Our Braeside Customers Say

Steve was very punctual with coming to assess our roofing situation. He discussed with me every aspect of the job required for the replacement of our very old tin roof.This all happened at a particularly busy time for Steve’s company and he kept me up to date with the preparation of the job. Once it started it was a very slick operation completed within 4 days. I wasn’t there during the day but saw the results of progress each afternoon. They have done a very neat professional job and I am very happy with the result. Steve was a pleasure to deal with. Well done.

Cameron Kennedy-Miller
★★★★★

Quick response to request for estimate. Price matched that given by local plumber. Work commenced soon after acceptance of quote and as agreed. Standard of work very good – impressive. Corrugated iron roof replaced with ColourBond – 2 day’s work. (New insulation laid over old, no battens replaced, screwed down). Roof no longer leaking and good work around chimney flue. Adaptable to site requirements. Due regard to safety of residents and pets. Excellent site clean-up (choice of remove old iron or keep it). Would use this organisation again.

Collin Parker
★★★★★ View All Reviews

Book a Roof Restoration in Braeside

If your home or commercial property needs roof restoration in Braeside, don’t wait for the next storm to cause more damage. Contact Sandhurst Roofing today for a free, no-obligation quote.

Call Steve on 0448 812 800 or submit your details through our online form — and let’s get your roof looking brand new again.
